generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on permanent magnet synchronous motor for measuring position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox for measuring position after gear transmission"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance DerivedTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data trace from physical robot"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque and velocity data from motor current and position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulatedMotorOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output data from friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel output data from friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output data from friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, VisualizationService
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor acting as current-to-torque converter for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component for rotational energy transformation in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for torque transmission in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation models including Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for machine control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for unified data presentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization of sensor data, friction models, and system performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control adjustments for improved motion accuracy in machining applications"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML for the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion control using Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAction
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss identification enabling control parameter adjustments for improved motion accuracy in machining applications"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control parameters based on friction loss identification to improve motion accuracy in machining applications"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of system performance and friction models for monitoring"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management insights via AAS"
]

instance MotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Motion control commands issued by SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming status via MQTT"
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance Simulink_CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance Simulink_LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensors, SysML_BDD_Model, SysML_IBD_Model, Simulink_CoulombViscousModel, Simulink_StribeckModel, Simulink_DahlModel, Simulink_LuGreModel, AssetAdministrationShell, MeasuredMotorPosition, MeasuredGearPosition, MeasuredInputCurrent, DerivedTorqueVelocity, SimulatedMotorOutput, SimulatedGearwheelOutput, SimulatedSystemOutput
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming via MQTT, enabling continuous model identification during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, behavioral Simulink friction models, and operational data via AAS with real-time MQTT data linking and unified dashboard visualization"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated stage, utilizing live operational data to capture wear-induced changes and dynamic friction behavior during robot use"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission between physical robot and digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for system modeling and data description."
]
